raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year> a purchase of {$880.00} was made on citibank visa card. This purchase was for a XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX 
It was made on a website called XXXX '. I immediately submitted cancellation request on XX/XX/year> with seller XXXX. This order was placed in error during the live auction stream. Seller XXXX from XXXX had a user in live auction who troll bidded item. This essentially means there is a XXXX  in live auction who has ability to raise intended amount a buyer ( me ) willing to pay. I Immediately contacted seller explaining issue. As this has happened before on website, with every seller understanding of common issue and refund issued promtly. However in this case they refused to approve cancellation request, eventhough there is clearly a refund period listed on sellers item description with purchase. ( please see pics I added as proof ) Item arrived on XX/XX/year>. Here is more documentation proving my return attempt and outcome. I Contacted citi bank explaining issue and followed all steps as directed. They denied my request in honoring a refund despite having all proper documentation submitted.
